## PART 8: LEGAL PAGES, UX PAGES, PWA

All new pages must:
- Match the existing dark navy `#0f172a` and electric blue `#2563eb` visual design
- Be mobile responsive
- Pass WCAG 2.1 AA
- Load in under 2 seconds
- Include proper meta titles and descriptions
- Link back to `genesisai.systems`
- Include Genesis AI Systems branding
- Show Trendell Fordham as founder

### PAGE 1: PRIVACY POLICY
File: `/Users/genesisai/portfolio/privacy-policy.html`

Create a complete standalone HTML page with these sections:
1. Introduction
   - Genesis AI Systems takes privacy seriously
   - Effective date: March 28, 2026
   - Contact: `info@genesisai.systems`
2. Information We Collect
   - Name, email, phone, and business name
   - Usage data and demo interactions
   - Call recordings with consent
3. How We Use Information
   - To respond to inquiries
   - To provide services
   - Never sold to third parties
4. AI Systems and Data
   - OpenAI processes lead data
   - Vapi processes voice calls
   - Claude processes chatbot queries
   - Google Sheets stores data using encrypted Google infrastructure
5. Data Retention
   - Lead data: 2 years
   - Call recordings: 90 days
   - Deleted on written request
6. Your Rights (CCPA compliant)
   - Right to know
   - Right to delete
   - Right to opt out
   - Contact: `info@genesisai.systems`
7. Cookies
   - Minimal analytics cookies only
   - No advertising cookies
   - Explain how to disable cookies
8. AI Transparency (Colorado AI Act)
   - AI used in lead scoring
   - AI powers Riley voice agent
   - AI powers the chat widget
   - Humans review significant decisions
9. Contact
   - Trendell Fordham
   - Genesis AI Systems
   - Detroit, MI
   - info@genesisai.systems
   - (313) 400-2575

Use plain English instead of legal jargon.
Link to this page from the footer.

### PAGE 2: TERMS OF SERVICE
File: `/Users/genesisai/portfolio/terms.html`

Create a complete standalone HTML page with these sections:
1. Agreement to Terms
   - Using `genesisai.systems` means the user agrees
   - Effective date: March 28, 2026
2. Services Description
   - Genesis AI Systems provides AI automation
   - Services are described at `genesisai.systems`
   - Custom systems are governed by client agreements
3. Client Responsibilities
   - Provide accurate business information
   - Maintain API accounts and credentials
   - Pay invoices within 7 days
   - 30-day cancellation notice for retainers
4. Intellectual Property
   - Genesis AI Systems owns code and systems
   - Client owns business data
   - Client receives a license to use delivered systems
   - Genesis AI Systems retains rights to anonymized performance data
5. AI Limitations and Disclaimer
   - AI systems may make errors
   - Genesis AI Systems is not liable for AI mistakes
   - Client must review critical outputs
   - Voice agent is not a substitute for human judgment
6. Payment Terms
   - 50% deposit before work begins
   - Balance due on delivery
   - Monthly retainers due on the 1st
   - Late fee: 1.5% per month
7. Limitation of Liability
   - Maximum liability: 3 months of retainer fees
   - No liability for lost revenue or lost data
   - No liability for downtime outside the SLA
8. Service Level Agreement
   - 99.5% uptime guarantee
   - Credit of 10% of monthly fee per 1% below SLA
   - Emergency response within 4 hours
9. Termination
   - 30-day written notice required
   - Data exported and deleted within 90 days
   - No refunds on setup fees
10. Governing Law
    - State of Michigan
    - Detroit, MI jurisdiction
11. Contact
    - info@genesisai.systems
    - (313) 400-2575

Use plain English throughout.
Link to this page from the footer.

### PAGE 5: PWA SETUP

#### manifest.json
File: `/Users/genesisai/portfolio/manifest.json`

Create this file:

```json
{
  "name": "Genesis AI Systems",
  "short_name": "Genesis AI",
  "description": "Done-for-you AI automation for local businesses",
  "start_url": "/",
  "display": "standalone",
  "background_color": "#0f172a",
  "theme_color": "#2563eb",
  "orientation": "portrait",
  "icons": [
    {
      "src": "/icons/icon-192.png",
      "sizes": "192x192",
      "type": "image/png"
    },
    {
      "src": "/icons/icon-512.png",
      "sizes": "512x512",
      "type": "image/png"
    }
  ]
}
```
